name: traffic_violation
description: ``` traffic-violation-system/ ├── dashboard/                   # Frontend HTML/CSS (Police UI) │   ├── login.html               # Officer login page │   └── officer.html             # Main dashboard (violations + risk scores) │ ├── api-server/                  # Node.js REST API (Port 5000) │   ├── server.js                # Main server (vanilla http module) │   ├── .env.example             # Environment variable template │   └── package.json             # (you'll create this) │ ├── plate-service/               # Python services │   ├── app.py                   # Plate detection API (Port 8000, OpenCV + EasyOCR) │   └── risk_model.py            # ML risk prediction (Port 8001, scikit-learn) │ └── database/     └── schema.sql               # Full Supabase PostgreSQL schema ```
